untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is an entry filter/validation rule that specifies minimum statistical reliability (55% win rate over 50+ trades in 1-5 day timeframes) required to accept an entry concept. It describes which trading ideas to reject, not how to size positions once an entry is triggered. Position sizing rules specify dollar amounts, risk percentages, or position multipliers—this rule is a gating criterion for concept acceptance.
